name: Aikido Security (npx)
description: Scan code and secrets with Aikido Security directly from your AI coding agent. Exposes Aikido's Code and Secrets Scan as an MCP tool returning machine-readable findings you can triage, fix, or ignore.

inputs.label: Aikido Personal Access Token
inputs.description: Personal Access Token for headless/CI use. Optional: if omitted, the first tool call returns one-time browser sign-in links (EU / US / ME) instead. When set, AIKIDO_API_KEY takes precedence over the cached browser token. Generate it in the Aikido dashboard under Settings > Integrations > MCP Server.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to the Aikido dashboard at app.aikido.dev
2. Go to Settings > Integrations > MCP Server
3. Generate a Personal Access Token
4. Copy the token

Alternatively, leave this blank and run any Aikido tool: the first call returns one-time browser sign-in links (EU / US / ME) for your account region.

auth.instructions: Generate a Personal Access Token in the Aikido dashboard under Settings > Integrations > MCP Server and provide it as AIKIDO_API_KEY. Alternatively, leave it unset to use the interactive browser sign-in flow (one-time links per region returned on the first tool call).
